channel.title: 写程序的龙龙 (Posts about Emacs)

item.title: Spacemacs主题列表
item.dc:creator: 龙龙
item.description:
dotspacemacs-themes '(material-light
                      adwaita
                      alect-black-alt
                      alect-light
                      ample-flat
                      anti-zenburn
                      badwolf
                      bubbleberry
                      clues
                      cyberpunk
                      darkmine
                      default
                      dorsey
                      flatui
                      gotham
                      granger
                      hc-zenburn
                      heroku
                      ir-black
                      junio
                      light-soap
                      material
                      minimal
                      molokai
                      monokai
                      niflheim
                      occidental
                      organic-green
                      phoenix-dark-pink
                      purple-haze
                      sanityinc-solarized-dark
                      sanityinc-tomorrow-bright
                      sanityinc-tomorrow-night
                      soft-charcoal
                      soothe
                      stekene-light
                      sunny-day
                      tango-dark
                      tao-yang
                      tronesque
                      twilight
                      ujelly
                      whiteboard
                      zen-and-art
                      zonokai-red
                      zenburn
                      wilson
                      underwater
                      twilight-anti-bright
                      tsdh-dark
                      tao-yin
                      tango-plus
                      tango
                      subatomic
                      spolsky
                      spacegray
                      soft-morning
                      seti
                      sanityinc-tomorrow-day
                      sanityinc-solarized-light
                      reverse
                      planet
                      pastels-on-dark
                      odersky
                      noctilux
                      mustang
                      monochrome
                      minimal-light
                      lush
                      leuven
                      jazz
                      hickey
                      hemisu-dark
                      gruber-darker
                      graham
                      fogus
                      firebelly
                      espresso
                      dichromacy
                      darktooth
                      dakrone
                      colorsarenice-dark
                      busybee
                      birds-of-paradise-plus
                      apropospriate-dark
                      ample-light
                      alect-light-alt
                      alect-dark
                      afternoon
                      alect-black
                      alect-dark-alt
                      ample
                      ample-zen
                      apropospriate-light
                      brin
                      cherry-blossom
                      colorsarenice-light
                      darkburn
                      deeper-blue
                      django
                      farmhouse-dark
                      flatland
                      gandalf
                      grandshell
                      gruvbox
                      hemisu-light
                      inkpot
                      jbeans
                      light-blue
                      manoj-dark
                      mccarthy
                      misterioso
                      monochrome-bright
                      naquadah
                      obsidian
                      oldlace
                      phoenix-dark-mono
                      professional
                      ritchie
                      sanityinc-tomorrow-blue
                      sanityinc-tomorrow-eighties
                      smyx
                      soft-stone
                      stekene-dark
                      subatomic256
                      tango-2
                      tangotango
                      toxi
                      tsdh-light
                      twilight-bright
                      wheatgrass
                      wombat
                      zonokai-blue
                      farmhouse-light
                      spacemacs-dark
                      spacemacs-light)

item.title: Docker中Emacs支持退格
item.dc:creator: 龙龙
item.description:
默认在Docker中，Emacs使用退格无法删除光标前的字符，而是显示帮助信息，这让人有些费解，可以采用如下方法解决：

emacs ~/.emacs
(global-set-key "\C-h" 'backward-delete-char-untabify)
(global-set-key "\d" 'delete-char)
C-x C-s
C-x C-c

这时再用emacs命令打开文件，就可以正常使用退格键删除光标前的字符了。
